INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT (CUSTODIANS
OF COLLECTIVE INVESTMENT SCHEMES)

[ L.S.370.32

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.32
REGOLAMENTI DWAR CUSTODIANS OF
COLLECTIVE INVESTMENT SCHEMES
(INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT)*
5 ta’ April, 2016
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 114 tal-2016.

*Dawn ir regolamenti ġie ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
